memory.summary: Teammate offered help but requested me to do their part since I'm better. My plan to finish my share now conflicts with this request.

Teammate's share was added to my load, but they now took it all on themselves, shifting the burden back. My energy remains critically low at 0.0.
Teammate shifted their task back to me, increasing my load to 0.73 while I remain at zero energy and high stress.
Teammate dumped my share on me, then immediately took it back, increasing my load to 0.76 while leaving me at zero energy and critical stress.
Teammate dumped my work on me, then immediately took it all back, cycling the burden twice while leaving me at zero energy and critical stress.
